SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:28am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk-P. Natt, nothing on record. dept.525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Rene Peinado was not present. Respondent Star Reporting Service, Inc. was represented by Eastellier Bruihl. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to question from Judge Myles.

EXHR-(A) Group 1 is three page Invoice dated 12/23/11; 1/25/12; 1/5/12.

9:31am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
